name_en: Original Fendi Small First in Monogram is here!!
name_cn:
Original Fendi Small First in Monogram is here!!
Under the direction of designer Kim Jones, this is the first Fendi bag, overturning the previous bag shape. The metal trim and large Logo lock, combined with the body design, combine architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, it grabs attention instantly! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also gives a high-end street chic feel when crossbody!
Large: 127B98 Size 32.5x15x23.5cm
Small: 129B88 Size 26x9.5x18cm
